product.name: Gerber Cymira 23 in. Oval Vessel Bathroom Sink, Above-Counter Glazed White Fireclay Ceramic Vanity Sink, Modern Transitional Basin Sink Bowl, G0013777
product.description: Upgrade your bathroom with the Gerber Cymira Oval Bathroom Vessel Sink, featuring a sleek, no-seam design and oval basin for a modern, elevated look. This above-counter vessel sink transforms primary or secondary bathrooms into a stylish retreat while offering practical performance. Crafted from durable fireclay with a stain- and scratch-resistant baked-on glaze, this countertop sink combines beauty with lasting strength. The extra-deep basin helps reduce splashing and keeps water contained, while the centered 1-3/4" pre-drilled drain hole fits most standard pop-up or push-down bathroom sink drains (no overflow). Designed for versatility, this above-counter fireclay sink pairs seamlessly with most wall-mounted or vessel bathroom faucets, making it a perfect choice for modern bathroom vanities.
features: SEAMLESS DESIGN: Above-countertop vanity sink has no seams or visible lines for a smooth, clean look
DURABLE MATERIAL: Crafted from durable fireclay for a lifetime of stain- and scratch-resistance
EASY TO CLEAN: Rounded curves paired with a baked-on glaze for easy wipe downs with a cloth
LOW SPLASH: Extra-deep basin helps prevent splashing during use by keeping water within the bowl
FAUCET COMPATIBILITY: Pair with your favorite Gerber wall-mount or vessel bathroom faucet
STANDARD DRAIN FIT: Complete with 1-3/4", pre-drilled drain hole compatible with Gerber pop-up or push-down bathroom sink drain hardware
PREMIUM QUALITY PLUMBING: Gerber Plumbing offers timeless products that sport a sleek, modern look, and are a thoughtful balance of form and function
PEACE-OF-MIND: Backed by a limited lifetime warranty
